BusinessDescription: Shufersal is one of Israel's largest supermarket chains, operating over 300 stores nationwide. The company offers a wide variety of products including fresh produce, packaged goods, household items, and kosher products. Shufersal has multiple store formats including Shufersal Deal discount stores, Shufersal Sheli neighborhood stores, and Shufersal Online for e-commerce.

Carrefour is a French multinational retail corporation that operates hypermarkets, supermarkets and convenience stores. It is one of the largest hypermarket chains in the world, with stores across Europe, Asia, Africa and Latin America.
Yochananof is a leading Israeli supermarket chain known for its competitive prices and wide selection of products. The chain operates multiple branches across Israel.
H. Cohen is a major wholesale distributor in Israel, supplying products to retailers, restaurants, and institutions across the country.
Middle Trade is a wholesale distribution company specializing in import and export of food products in the Middle East region.
Ha'Sade Organic is a specialty store chain focusing on organic and natural products, catering to health-conscious consumers.
Harduf is an organic food producer and distributor, known for high-quality organic dairy products and vegetables.

Dor Alon is a leading energy and retail company in Israel, operating approximately 220 fueling stations nationwide. The company is known for its extensive network, with locations spanning from north to south, providing fuel services and convenience store products to millions of customers annually. Dor Alon stations often include Am:Pm convenience stores, offering a wide range of products from snacks and beverages to household essentials.
ProPlus is a retail chain offering a variety of household and consumer products at competitive prices.
Super Sapir is a regional supermarket chain known for fresh products and personalized customer service.
Milouoff is a specialty food retailer focusing on imported and gourmet products.
Victory Supermarket is a growing retail chain with multiple locations across central Israel.
Mega Bool is a discount supermarket chain offering bulk purchasing options for families and businesses.
Tiv Taam is Israel's leading non-kosher supermarket chain, offering a wide selection of international products.
Osher Ad is a discount supermarket chain known for offering low prices on a wide range of products.
Rami Levy is one of Israel's largest discount supermarket chains, known for low prices and wide selection.
King Store is an online retailer specializing in imported foods and specialty items.
Eden Teva Market is a natural and organic food chain with locations throughout Israel.
Machsanei Hashuk is a wholesale market operator providing fresh produce to retailers and restaurants.
Fresh Market specializes in premium fresh produce and gourmet food products.
Zol VeBegadol is a warehouse-style discount retailer offering bulk purchases at wholesale prices.
Stop Market is a convenience store chain with extended hours, serving urban areas across Israel.
